titleStmt.title: SII 24.268: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 268. (A.R. No. 62 of 1936-37.) SAME WALL.

summary.p: Records a gift of land in tirukkuṟaippaṟṟu by purchase for a flower garden to a person named Vaikunda-dāsar with the stipulation that he should grow flowers and supply garlands to the temple for the merit of queen Kamalādēvi, the daughter of Ariyapiḷḷai-Daṇḍanāyaka, a pradhāna of the king, and her two daughters Periyataṅgi Iṟaiyakkaṉ and Vichchaṇṇaṉ. The inscription is dated in the 8th regnal year of the king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīḥ . śrī virarāmanāthadevarkku yāṇṭu Eṭṭāvatu mār(k)kaḻi mātattu devar pradhānikaḷil Ariyapiḷḷai daṇḍaṉāyakkar makaḷ devar Aracimā
ril kamalā deviyārkkum Ivar makaḷ periyataṅki Iṟai Akkaṉukkum Ivaḷ taṅkai viccaṇṇaṉukkum naṉṟāka śrī raṅganādhaṉukku tirumālai
cātta tirukkuṟaippaṟṟil teṉṉoḻukil śrīvaikunta dāsar tirunantavaṉattuk kiṭaiyil muṉpu koṇṭu kuṭutta tirunantavaṉam kol mu
ṉṟukku kiḻakku Ittoṭu cera Iṟṟaiṉāḷāl ṉālāyiraṅ kācukkuk koṇṭu kuṭutta tirunantavaṉaṅ kol Oṉṟum Ākak kol
ṉālum tiruppaḷḷittāmam vaiyttu ṉāḷ Oṉṟukku nālu tirumālai śrīvaikunta dāsar śrī raṅganāthaṉukku cāttivippatākavum
Itu candrādityavarai naṭattak kaṭavatākak kāṇiyākak koṇṭuviṭṭatu ciṟukūrc ceru maṇṇaṉukku ṉaṉṟāka Itile Oru kol taṟai
koṇṭu viṭṭatu .§
Digital edition of SII 24.268 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
